problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Cortical. Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
